feed.title: SAP Community - SAP TechEd
feed.subtitle: SAP TechEd Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to make use of SAP TechEd learning in SAP ECC on HANA system?
entry.content:
My organization uses Suite on HANA -> SAP ECC(EHP8) on HANA

Our ABAP & UI5 versions listed below: 

SAP_ABA - 750

SAP_GWFND 750

SAPUI5 on ABAP - 1.71.50

OpenUI5 Version - 1.71.47

What are all SAP TechEd learnings that we can implement staying in the same system configurations or with little change? 

SAP HANA service for SAP BTP  SAP Build SAP Datasphere Joule ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model SAP Mobile App Framework SAP Business Application Studio

entry.title: Extracting Table from WebPage
entry.content:
Hi Everyone I Need to extract a table from Webpage. I am using the get list activity to return the values in the array. But it's showing it as a wrong function. Kindly refer to the below screenshots for reference.

error-sap.png

datatable.png

Do suggest me if you have any other method for this.

entry.title: S4/HANA Migration Project ATC Check: S/4HANA: Search for Usages of Simplified Object , LFA1
entry.content:
Hello,

We have ATC Check report to analyze the custom code. we got check message with Priority 1 and check message. sap note 2296016 information is not enough to adapt the change or replaced object.

S/4HANA: Search for Usages of Simplified Objects
Functionality not available: no functional equivalent2296016REMOVAL OF TECHNICAL APPLICATION ANALYSISTABLLFA1DTAB - Referenced object type is a database table

any input how to adapt the code for such ATC checks.?

Thanks..!

Regards

entry.title: Limit of formula in account dimension
entry.content: How many formula does SAP Analytics Cloud support in account dimension ?

entry.title: Crystal reports in ubuntu?
entry.content:
Tengo unas facturas hechas en crystal reports, quiero saber si en el ordenador ubuntu que tengo puedo instalar algo de crystal reports o alguna otra aplicacion para poder visualizar en una aplicacion web los .rpt que se generan, mi proyecto esta hecho en php.
 
I have some invoices made in crystal reports, I want to know if in the ubuntu computer that I have I can install something of crystal reports or some other application to be able to visualize in a web application the .rpt that are generated, my project is made in php.

entry.title: Anyone tell me , How to Export UI5 Screen as pdf file upon button click
entry.content: How to save UI5 Screen as Pdf File with multiple pages.

entry.title: BAPI_PR_CHANGE is not updating Service Component of PR
entry.content:
Title: Troubleshooting BAPI_PR_CHANGE: Addressing Issues

I've recently got one issue with BAPI_PR_CHANGE. I'm trying to update the service component details of PR which is already created. I changed the quantity of Service component and executed the BAPI in an sequence along with Transaction commit. It is showing success message in Result screen along with certain Information Messages which is stating "Changes could not be Effected". Please refer the screenshot below for the respective message.

The success message is stating that PR is updated but in ESLL table level the service PR is not updated. I've checked by changing test data multiple times but it is still not updating. But in ME52N Transaction level if I change and click on save button then it is updating in ESLL Table.

This is the input that I'm giving in SERVICELINES tab of BAPI_PR_CHANGE and I'm trying to change the quantity of it. But in the table level the quantity is not reflecting as shown below.

Here I'm trying to change the service quantity as 200 but the quantity is still 15 in table which is old one entered while creating service components and this is the issue. Service component data is not updating to ESLL table against sub package number.

For this issue I've tried multiple things and it goes as follows;

1. I tried debugging the standard Service PR ME52N Change Transaction and tried to trace how standard is updating the Service details but I found that they are not at all using BAPI_PR_CHANGE and they are using some internal logic and sequence of Update FMs to update ESLL table.

2. I tried debugging the BAPI and tried to find the spot where the update is not happening but with that also I cant able to find proper input.

3. I got the standard application of Manage PR from Fiori App library and tried to trace how it is getting handled in standard app but there I found they are using SAP GUI FOR HTML for this specific update scenario and for create and delete they are using BOPF Framework. Henceforth there also I cant able to trace the update logic hence for update same standard program is triggering from application.

It will be really helpful for me if someone helps me with this issue either by spotting any inconsistency in BAPI Test case or with approach we are following. We are struck with this for long time.

entry.title: Access to sample datasets used in SAP Teched
entry.content:
Hello,

Is there any way that we can access all the sample datasets used in the teched sap sessions?
The Github link only has the the steps that are meant to be followed but there was no sample dataset present in the page.

Kindly help with this query.
Thank You

entry.title: Conversion Routine in AMDP for MATERIAL (MATNR)
entry.content:
Hi Team,

How can we use 'CONVERSION_EXIT_MATN1_INPUT'  in AMDP, where we need to convert Material No, into internal formant ? we have to avoid loop

entry.title: ABAP
entry.content:
Hello everyone, please help me with the following question:

You have a superclass super1 and a subclass sub1 of super1. Each class has an instance constructor and a static constructor. The first statement of the program created an instance of sub1. In which sequence will the constructors be executed?

a. Class constructor of super1

b. Instance constructor of sub1 c. Instance constructor of super 1 d. Class constructor of sub1.

entry.title: Error in Scrap Sales Order
entry.content:
While creating scrap sale order below error occurred. Please do the needful.
"Material 8000000011 is not defined for sales org. D001, distr.chan.40, language EN" 
"Sales from sales organization, D001 dist. chan.40, plant D101 are not defined"

entry.title: Quote comparison in sap
CSV attachment gets generated with no content while sending it via mail adapter in SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hi,

Currently, I am sending an error email notification with the CSV attachment. The attachment gets generated with no content. Can anyone please help me to resolve this issue. 

Regards,

Carol

entry.title: SAP ESS Weekly Calender Days are not displayed in Correct Order
entry.content:
The display of the weekly calendar is incorrect when making time booking corrections in ESS. Tuesday always appear at the end of the week (after Sunday). I have tried adjusting the view settings, but have not been able to solve the problem yet. It is only for one employee and for everyone else it is displaying correctly. I also delete all the cookies and cache memory but no solution yet. Can anyone help me to fix this issue. 

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Analytics Cloud Top-N is not supported in a charts with structures
entry.content:
Hello 

I am having a live model connected to a query in BW4H, the query contains a huge structure for contribution margin calculation. On top of the model there is a story with a chart, the chart displays one measure and one entry of the structure. I would like to use a rank option but it is greyed out and says it is not supported. See attachment

Any workaround or idea?

entry.title: Any Note so that the External Equipment Type accepts the "Ñ" since it doesn't let us?
entry.content: We are creating teams with external number ranges from "AAAAA - ZZZZZZ" but we get to the 4th character of the letter "Ñ" and it does not let us advance because it gives us the error: IS045, where we have a different character, is there a note for Mexico?

entry.title: How can i forward outlook mail to sapuser@sapipaddress(sap user name and sap ip address)?
Industry Best Practices while implementing SAP Quality Management
Can anyone help me in Issue in Fiori Elements Regarding Interactive chart ALP with some error
entry.content:
Hi ,

I Am writing to a Fiori Elements Application with Interactive Charts but i am getting an error while using the guided development in VS Code.
Please find the error in below image

Thanks,

Pavan.

entry.title: Error: Error during request to remote service: Failed to build headers.
entry.content:
Hello, community!

I am encountering an issue while working with an SAP CAP-based application. Despite my best efforts to debug, I haven’t been able to resolve it. I'm sharing the details here, hoping someone can guide me toward a solution.

Error Details

The error message I’m facing is as follows:


Context

I’m working on a CAP application where I need to integrate with an external OData v2 service hosted on SAP SuccessFactors (SFSF). The connection is configured to use an SAP BTP destination. I’m relying on the @SAP/cds framework to handle the OData service requests.

Package.json Configuration

Here's the relevant portion of my package.json:

 

Connection Handler Code

This is the function I’m using to connect to the backend:

Custom Handler

Service Implementation:

Service.cds

  

Service Handler:

 

Troubleshooting Steps Tried

  1. Verified all required dependencies and their versions.

  2. Configured the destination correctly in SAP BTP with valid URL, username, and password.

  3. Added forwardAuthToken: true to package.json under the credentials for SFSF.

  4. Ensured the model path is correctly mapped.

  5. Checked network connectivity and ensured no firewalls are blocking requests.

 

 

 

Question to the Community

Despite implementing these steps, I continue to encounter the error "Error: Error during request to remote service: Failed to build headers." Could someone with experience in CAP-SuccessFactors integration share insights or steps I might have missed?

 

If you've faced and resolved a similar issue or have expertise in this area, I would be grateful for your guidance. Please share your thoughts in the comments below.

Thank you in advance for your support!

SAP Community, SAP TechEd  SAP BTP cockpit SAP Cloud Application Programming Model , Node.js API SAP SuccessFactors Learning
